Notes: Migrated from the legacy TSV rendering manifests.

Target.Reason: MuPDF is the accepted effective-page-box target; pdfe matches the same visible page extent while Poppler/Ghostscript choose incompatible extents.

1.QualityReason: Focused 150 DPI review shows pdfe and MuPDF render the same cropped Experimentation page; residual difference is small text antialiasing.
